2605.22355.title: TransitLM: A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for Map-Free Transit Route Generation
2605.22355.paper_summary: Public transit route planning traditionally depends on structured map infrastructure and complex routing engines, and no existing dataset supports training models to bypass this dependency. We present TransitLM, a large-scale dataset of over 13 million transit route planning records from four Chinese cities covering 120,845 stations and 13,666 lines, released as a continual pre-training corpus and benchmark data for three evaluation tasks with complementary metrics. Experiments show that an LLM trained on TransitLM produces structurally valid routes at high accuracy and implicitly grounds arbitrary GPS coordinates to appropriate stations without any explicit mapping. These results demonstrate that transit route planning can be learned entirely from data, enabling end-to-end, map-free route generation directly from origin-destination information. The dataset and benchmark are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/GD-ML/TransitLM, with evaluation code at https://github.com/HotTricker/TransitLM.
2605.22355.paper_summary_zh: 公共交通路線規劃傳統上依賴於結構化的地圖基礎設施和複雜的路由引擎，而現有的數據集並不支持訓練模型以繞過這一依賴。我們提出了TransitLM，一個來自四個中國城市的超過1300萬條公共交通路線規劃記錄的大型數據集，涵蓋了120,845個車站和13,666條路線，作為持續預訓練語料庫和三個評估任務的基準數據，並提供互補的指標。實驗表明，基於TransitLM訓練的LLM以高準確度產生結構上有效的路線，並且在沒有任何明確映射的情況下，將任意GPS坐標隱式地對應到適當的車站。這些結果表明，公共交通路線規劃可以完全從數據中學習，使得從起點到終點的信息直接生成端到端、無需地圖的路線。數據集和基準可在https://huggingface.co/datasets/GD-ML/TransitLM獲得，評估代碼則在https://github.com/HotTricker/TransitLM。
2605.22355.author: Hanyu Guo et.al.
2605.22355.authors: Hanyu Guo, Jiedong Yang, Chao Chen, Longfei Xu, Kaikui Liu, Xiangxiang Chu
